The details

It's all in the details

Hand-tufted buttons, considered nailhead trim, and fabrics chosen to feel as good as they look — the small touches that make each piece unmistakably yours.

Furniture you'll want
to look at every day.

We don't do off-the-shelf. Each piece is made to order, finished with care, and built to feel like it was always meant for your home.

Donna Rivera Furniture Corp · Gen. Trias, Cavite
Process

From idea to your home

A calm, simple process — clear updates from first message to final piece.

I

Send your idea

Tell us the piece, size, and a reference photo. We reply with a quote quickly.

II

Approve the quote

We confirm fabric, finish, and price. You approve, we begin.

III

We craft it

Your piece is made to order, with progress photos along the way.

IV

Delivery

Once ready, we deliver your finished piece straight to your home.

Let's make yours
